text: It is considered as a reliable and accurate technique and is now routinely used in our department.
This is an example where the demarcation between segment 6 and the basilar segments to be resected is clear.
After control of the basilar arterial trunk, indocyanine green was intravenously injected at the dose of 0.2 mg kilos.
Delineation between segment 6 and 8 was precise, but we were surprised observing marking not only of segment 6, but also of segment 9 and 10.
